name: @nativa/vanilla-cards
description: Vanilla JS and CSS cards architecture for Nativa CMS

scripts.build: vite build && cp dist/vite-entry.html dist/index.html && rm -rf v0.0.1 && mkdir -p v0.0.1 && cp -r dist/* v0.0.1/ && cp dist/index.html index.html && cp dist/*.js . 2>/dev/null || true && cp dist/*.css . 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r dist/assets . 2>/dev/null || true
